title: Squirrel Removal in Norwood, Bronx | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Norwood, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Norwood attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Norwood and the greater Bronx area. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your home from squirrel damage.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Norwood homeowners for years with fast, effective squirrel removal backed by our satisfaction guarantee. Our team understands the unique challenges of Norwood's residential properties and provides customized solutions with upfront pricing from $900 to $2,500.
localContext: Norwood's tree-lined streets and mix of single-family homes, multi-family dwellings, and pre-war buildings near Woodlawn Cemetery and Mosholu Parkway create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. The neighborhood's proximity to Van Cortlandt Park means squirrels frequently find their way into attics, chimneys, and roof spaces throughout the area.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Norwood?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Norwood typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Norwood home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible entry holes in your roofline or soffits, chewed wires or insulation, and squirrel droppings in your attic space.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We safely relocate squirrels and then seal all entry points to prevent future infestations without harm to the animals.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Norwood?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Norwood are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and accessibility of entry points. We begin with trapping, followed by exclusion work and any necessary repairs to ensure squirrels cannot return.
